headlines.title: Israel strikes Iranian military targets hours after Tehran launched its own attacks
headlines.description: Israel's military said that it struck Iranian military targets in the western and central parts of the country. NBC News' Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Trump says the U.S. will work with Iran to destroy its uranium if they can make a deal
headlines.description: The president offered detailed remarks about the status of negotiations to end the war with Iran and its impact on the economy.

headlines.title: Iranians feel ‘sense of pride’ after launching strikes on Israel
headlines.description: Iranians took to the streets of Tehran after Iran launched missiles toward Israel for the first time since a ceasefire was reached in April. The strikes came after Israel struck Beirut’s southern suburbs in retaliation for alleged Hezbollah attacks.

headlines.title: Trump on new Fed Chair Warsh: ‘I don’t want to have a big influence on him’
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, President Trump addresses the economy amid the war with Iran and says Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh is “fantastic,” adding, “I want him to do whatever he wants” when it comes to setting interest rates.

headlines.title: Trump says ‘I’d pay’ anti-weaponization fund applicants ‘the kind of money they deserve’
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, President Trump says “the weaponization fund is a great idea” and if Republicans “don't get it approved, I'd be disappointed.” Asked whether anyone who attacked police officers on January 6 should get taxpayer money, Trump says, “I wouldn't be inclined to say so, but I have to see it.”

headlines.title: Trump on Pressure to End Iran War With Peace Deal
headlines.description: Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker joins Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist to share key takeaways her exclusive interview with President Donald Trump about the war in Iran, its impact on the economy and his claims of voter fraud in California and the 2020 election. Kristen says, “I pressed him on his promise not to get the United States engaged in foreign wars. He said ‘This is not going to be a forever war.’ He insists it’s not a quagmire.”

headlines.title: Spencer Pratt Drops to Third Place in LA Mayor’s Race
headlines.description: Votes are still being counted in the closely-watched primary races in California, including for mayor of Los Angeles. Conservative reality TV star Spencer Pratt has dropped to third place behind current democratic Mayor Karen Bass, who is heading to the runoff, and progressive city councilwoman Nithya Raman. NBC’s Liz Kreutz reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: With Trump attending NBA Finals Game 3, Knicks watch party outside MSG is canceled
headlines.description: An NYPD spokesperson said the decision was made in coordination with the Secret Service.

headlines.title: New Jersey police ramp up security as state prepares for World Cup final
headlines.description: As the World Cups heads to 11 cities across the U.S., states are ramping up security to keep fans safe. New Jersey police take NBC News' Sam Brock inside their command center, where they will monitor stadiums, hotels, and training centers ahead of and during matches.

headlines.title: Iran and Israel exchange attacks and Spencer Pratt overtaken in L.A. mayoral race: Morning Rundown
headlines.description: Israel and Iran trade their first attacks since the ceasefire. Nithya Raman overtakes Spencer Pratt in the Los Angeles mayoral race. And inside Southeast Asia’s fraud network.

headlines.title: Federal lawsuit aims to stop UFC event on the White House South Lawn
headlines.description: Plaintiffs allege the June 14 event violates National Park Service regulations and benefits Trump and his allies.

headlines.title: Trailer carrying fireworks ignites in spectacular display on Tennessee highway
headlines.description: Cellphone video captured a spectacular, pre-Fourth of July display of fireworks on a Tennessee highway Saturday evening as a trailer carrying the incendiary haul erupted, authorities said
